title: Kanbus clock: add 4px gap under ID on COMMENT slides

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applying same spacing tweak as CREATED: add +2px spacer before first comment body line so ID-to-body gap is 4px total.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented COMMENT slide spacing: added +2px spacer before first body row (line index 1), giving 4px total under ID. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (19 passed). Triggered visual comment event on kanbus-a3994c.
